mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month acceleration in industrial production forecasts near-term earnings surprises, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in fewer than 55% of months when INDPRO increased, or Rank IC < 0.03 over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A cumulative rise in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points over six months signals entrenched labor market deterioration, reducing corporate revenue visibility and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 60-day returns are negative in fewer than 55% of triggered periods, or the mean return is not significantly below zero (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Joint growth in retail sales and residential construction starts confirms durable demand strength across consumption and investment channels, amplifying earnings growth expectations and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term of RSAFS and HOUST fails to achieve a Rank IC above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or the joint signal does not outperform the individual signals by at least 50% in hit rate.

mechanism_narrative: Under zero-interest-rate policy, stronger-than-trend payroll growth raises the probability of earlier monetary normalization, which tightens expected discount rates and drags S&P 500 returns lower over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: When FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%, months with above-median PAYEMS growth show negative 20-day S&P 500 returns in fewer than 55% of cases, or the conditional mean return is not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Sustained expansion in real retail sales signals robust consumer spending that supports corporate revenue growth, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns following months of RSAFS growth are positive in fewer than 55% of instances, or the Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in industrial production from the prior month signals immediate supply-side disruption and inventory destocking, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns following month-over-month INDPRO declines are negative in fewer than 55% of instances, or the signal Rank IC is above -0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating payroll employment growth tightens labor markets and lifts wage pressures, which compresses profit margins and generates negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Months with accelerating PAYEMS growth are followed by negative 20-day returns in fewer than 55% of cases, or Rank IC is above -0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent consumer price inflation erodes real corporate earnings and raises the required rate of return on equities, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns during periods of rising CPIAUCSL are negative in fewer than 55% of instances, or Rank IC is above -0.03.
